title: Chimi_Ti's Nightmare
description: Let the entity of my nightmare enter your world...
body:
This red eyed shadow may spawn at night near you... Listen to its laugh!

Most of the time it will just look at you and then disappear but if angry it will scream loudly and start running towards you!

Nothing can kill this ghost except one thing... Will you find out what?

Video : [Chimi_Ti's Nightmare - Minecraft mod 1.19.2](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RsNyG1YOa34)
